shell.signInDescription: Log in to continue using account features.

home.title: Account Center
home.description: View account status and manage profile, password, and email settings.

password.title: Change password
password.description: Send a password reset email to the current inbox.

email.title: Change email
email.description: Check verification status and change the login email.

gameProfiles.title: Game profiles
gameProfiles.description: Bind game accounts and manage local and cloud game data profiles.

home.emailWarning: Your email is not verified yet. Verify it to use game profiles, comments, schedule editing, and other features.

profile.title: Edit profile
profile.usernameDescription: Shown on account pages, comments, and similar surfaces.
profile.usernameHint: Username must be {min}-{max} characters and may include letters, numbers, spaces, symbols, and emoji

avatar.dialogDescription: The after-training art is used by default. You can switch card art after selecting a card.

password.title: Change password
password.description: Send a password reset email to the current inbox.
password.sectionDescription: The current receiving email is shown below. Change email first if this inbox is unavailable.
password.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Log in again and retry.
password.emailSent: Password reset email sent to the current inbox. Open the email to continue setting a new password.

email.title: Change email
email.description: The new email only takes effect after confirmation.
email.resendDescription: If the current email is not verified, you can send the verification email again.
email.submitDescription: After confirmation, the new email becomes the login email.
email.sameEmail: The new email must be different from the current email.
email.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Log in again and retry.
email.updateSent: A confirmation email has been sent to the new inbox. Follow the email to complete the change.
email.verificationSent: Verification email sent. Check your inbox and spam folder.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: View replies and likes on event comments.
notifications.empty: No new replies or likes yet.

gameProfiles.verifyTitle: Verify email to unlock game profiles
gameProfiles.verifyDescription: After email verification, you can bind game accounts, use cloud profiles, comment, and edit schedules.
